courseOutcomes.text: know and recall core knowledge of the syllabus.
analyze the problem and apply the appropriate concept.
apply core concepts to new situations.

units.title: Numerical Solution of Algebraic and Transcendental Equations
units.topics: Bisection Method, Secant Method, Regula-Falsi Method, Newton-Raphson Method, Successive Approximation Method, Applications.

units.title: Solution of Linear Simultaneous Equations
units.topics: Homogeneous/Non-homogeneous systems, Gauss Elimination, Gauss Jordan, Gauss-Seidel Methods, LU-Decomposition, Cholesky Method, Applications.

units.title: Interpolation and Numerical Differentiation
units.topics: Lagrange's Interpolation, Newton's forward, backward and central difference method, divided difference method, Inverse Interpolation, Applications. Numerical Differentiation: Forward, Backward and Central Difference Methods, Applications.

units.title: Numerical Integration and Curve Fitting
units.topics: Trapezoidal Rule, Simpson 1/3rd and 3/8th Rule, Gauss Quadrature - Two and Three Point Formula, Applications. Curve Fitting: least square criteria - 1st and 2nd Degree, Applications.

units.title: Numerical Solution of Ordinary Differential Equations
units.topics: Taylor Series Method, Euler Method, Modified Euler Method, Runge Kutta 2nd and 4th order method, Simultaneous Differential Equations and Second Order Differential Equations, Applications.

referenceBooks.name: Numerical Methods for Scientific and Engineering Computations
referenceBooks.author: Jain, M.K., Iyengar, S.R.K. and Jain, R.K.

referenceBooks.name: Numerical Methods in Science and Engineering - A practical Approach
referenceBooks.author: Rajasekaran, S.
